turns.transcript: Can you help me return an order that arrived damaged?
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: The screen was cracked right out of the packaging.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: I'd prefer a replacement rather than a refund if I can.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: How long does the exchange usually end up taking?
